# Your assessment, explained

You’ve been invited to a TestGorilla Assessment. Here’s what to expect, how to prepare, and how to feel confident in showcasing your skills.

A job seeker successfully completing a TestGorilla assessment

## **WHAT IS TESTGORILLA?**

We’re not the employer; we’re the platform that helps you prove your skills.

TestGorilla helps companies spot talent through skills-based hiring. No guesswork. Real data that gives recruiters an honest look at what you can do.

## WHAT TO EXPECT IN YOUR ASSESSMENT

* **Tailored to the job**: Every assessment is built for the role you’re applying to, with tasks that reflect real situations you may face at work. The goal is to show how your skills match what the job requires.
 
* **Short and focused**: Most assessments take between 30 and 60 minutes. You’ll get clear instructions along the way, so you can focus on showing your abilities without any distractions or unnecessary steps.
 
* **No prep needed**: There’s nothing to study. Your assessment is designed to highlight your real skills and not to test your memory. At the end, the recruiter may include a few custom questions tailored to the role. Just answer them in your own words.
 

## TAKING THE ASSESSMENT

Feeling a little nervous? That’s normal. Here’s how to set yourself up for a smooth experience:

Pick a calm, comfortable spot where you can focus without distractions.

Make sure your internet, camera, and microphone are all working well. It helps you stay relaxed and ready.

Assessments are timed, but there’s enough to think clearly and stay steady.

At the end of each test, you can pause. A short break helps you reset, reduce stress, and return ready to give your best.

In open questions or video responses, show how you think and solve problems in your own way.

## WHAT HAPPENS AFTER?

* **Your assessment results go to the recruiter**: They’ll decide the next steps and will inform you as needed.
 
* **You may see your results**: If the company chooses to share, we’ll send it straight to your inbox.
 
* **Beyond this job**: Create a free TestGorilla Profile to reuse your results, showcase your skills, and open doors to future roles.
 

Join our talent pool

## Frequently asked questions

Nope. These assessments are built to highlight your real strengths. No studying required.

Not at all! You can take your assessment straight from the invitation link. You’re always welcome to sign up for a free TestGorilla Profile if you’re open to new job opportunities.

Don’t stress. Click the support button in the assessment window or visit our Help Center for quick advice.

To keep things fair for everyone, you’ll only get one attempt. Take your time to get comfortable, check your setup, and start when you feel ready.

That depends on the recruiter. If they share them, we’ll send you an email with clear next steps.

Absolutely. Create a free TestGorilla Profile to save your results and stand out to even more recruiters.

## Hear from job seekers who’ve been there

The instructions were clear and everything was easy to follow. I really appreciate that they send an email to remind you that you have a test, so you can not miss it!

Jihane Khedir

TestGorilla job seeker

TestGorilla made my application process smooth and efficient. The platform is user-friendly, the instructions were clear, and the variety of assessments kept the process engaging. The detailed feedback provided valuable insights. Highly recommend!

Lesley Joy Omictin

TestGorilla job seeker

Taking the TestGorilla assessment was a smooth and efficient process. It effectively tested my skills in a clear and user-friendly way. I was particularly impressed by how it assessed my abilities relevant to the job, unlike the traditional CV route.

Michael Meuka

TestGorilla job seeker

Being a first-time user, the experience was good and interactive. With real-time assistance and examples of what to expect in your assessment.

Bramwel Vichehi

TestGorilla job seeker

One aspect that truly impressed me was TestGorilla's attention to detail and support throughout the assessment process. Clear instructions and valuable hints were readily available, ensuring that I felt adequately equipped to tackle each task with confidence and precision.

Fedrick Ambroise

TestGorilla job seeker
